name: OpenRouteService
description: OpenRouteService is an open-source routing, geocoding, and spatial analysis API built on OpenStreetMap data. It provides driving/walking/cycling directions, isochrone calculations (reachable areas), forward and reverse geocoding, distance/duration matrices, and elevation data. Use this for any location-based routing, address lookup, or geographic analysis task.

capabilities.name: get_directions
capabilities.description: Calculate a route between two or more points with turn-by-turn directions, distance, and duration for driving, walking, or cycling.

capabilities.name: get_isochrones
capabilities.description: Calculate reachable areas from a location within a given time or distance limit, returned as polygons.

capabilities.name: geocode_search
capabilities.description: Convert an address or place name into geographic coordinates (forward geocoding).

capabilities.name: reverse_geocode
capabilities.description: Convert geographic coordinates into a human-readable address (reverse geocoding).

capabilities.name: get_matrix
capabilities.description: Calculate a distance and/or duration matrix between multiple origin and destination points.

capabilities.name: get_elevation
capabilities.description: Get elevation data for one or more geographic coordinates.
